# Source Index

- `CMakeLists.txt`: Build rules for the vendored SQLite library and CLI.
- `README.sqlite.txt`: Notes about the bundled SQLite source drop.
- `VERSION`: Version marker for the vendored SQLite code.
- `shell.c`: SQLite command-line shell implementation.
- `sqlite3.c`: Amalgamated SQLite library source.
- `sqlite3.h`: Public SQLite C API header.
- `sqlite3ext.h`: SQLite extension API header.
